_comment: Achievement System Hook Configuration for Codex
_instructions: Copy this configuration to your Codex settings:
2. Add the 'hooks' section from this file
3. Adjust the script path to match your installation

PostToolUse._description: Track coding activities after each tool use

UserPromptSubmit._description: Track sessions and questions on each prompt

_setup_instructions.step1: Copy the achievement tracker script to hooks directory
_setup_instructions.step4: Add hooks configuration to Codex settings
_setup_instructions.step4_note: Merge the 'hooks' section above into your settings.json

_quick_setup_script:
#!/bin/bash
# Quick setup script
set -e

RUST_SKILLS_DIR="${1:-$(pwd)}"

echo "Setting up Achievement System..."

# Create directories
mkdir -p ~/.codex/hooks
mkdir -p ~/.codex/achievements

# Copy script
cp "$RUST_SKILLS_DIR/scripts/achievement-tracker.sh" ~/.codex/hooks/
chmod +x ~/.codex/hooks/achievement-tracker.sh

echo "✅ Achievement tracker installed!"
echo ""
echo "Next steps:"
echo "1. Add the hooks configuration to ~/.codex/settings.json"
echo "2. Run '/achievement' to view your achievements"

_environment_variables.CODEX_TOOL_NAME: Name of the tool being used (Edit, Write, Bash, etc.)
_environment_variables.CODEX_FILE_PATH: Path to the file being operated on

hook_not_triggering: Check if the script path is correct
Check Codex logs for hook errors
achievements_not_tracking: Run the script manually to test: ./achievement-tracker.sh PostToolUse
